privileged_info_summary: This task involves uploading a synthetic evidence file (Access_Logs_2025.xlsx) containing 150 employee access control records to an ARKCase case management system. The file is generated programmatically with realistic audit data including timestamps, employee IDs/names, access points (Front Entrance, Server Room, etc.), and access status (Granted/Denied). The case is titled 'Internal Audit - Unauthorized Access' and is created as a GENERAL complaint type. The agent must upload the file and create a working copy renamed to 'Access_Logs_Working_Copy.xlsx'. All metadata claims regarding filenames, case title, and data source path have been verified against the actual setup and verification scripts.
